title: amaranthus verticillatus
intro: Amaranthus verticillatus, also known as seven-horned amaranth, is a type of flowering plant in the amaranth family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Amaranthus verticillatus include reducing swelling and pain, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Amaranthus verticillatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use.
